actors.name: Curve Labs
actors.description: Web3 development lab building institutional ReFi technology. Core technical partner for Kolektivo Framework and tokenised ecological assets.

intel.value: Kolektivo - core technical partner for ReFi framework

actors.notes: Technical builder behind Kolektivo Framework. Worth tracking as independent ReFi infrastructure builder.

projects.name: Kolektivo Curacao
projects.description: Island-scale pilot implementing CuraDAI local stablecoin, tokenised food forests, and ecological UBI. Participants earn CuraDAI by contributing to social and ecological projects like beach cleanups and planting food forests.

projects.name: Strawbees Sustainability Station
projects.description: Educational programme aligning with UN SDGs, challenging students to design wind turbines, hurricane-resistant architecture, and assistive medical devices using physical prototyping tools.

people.skills: Community economies, Web3, ReFi, token engineering

people.notes: Only first name available in research.

people.job_title: Inventor, Co-founder, and Chief Innovation Officer
people.skills: Physical prototyping, maker education, EdTech, sustainable design pedagogy
people.notes: FLAG: Nordic / Sweden. Invented Strawbees after observing children in India building with waste materials. Skapa Diploma innovation award winner.
